      "n": 41,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "41. Un ja us winna Waiga
Breckehu winna Galwas Matti
irr iskrittujschi/ tad irr winisch
Plik-Galwis/winsch irr schkihsts.
42. Bet ja eefsch ta Plikkuma/
jeb Pleika weena balta pafarkana
Waina mettahs/tad iee irr Spit-
tati/ fus zaur winna Plikkumu
jeb Pleiki iskrittahs.
43. Un kad tas Preesteris
winnu irr apluhkojs/ un winna
Wainas Tubkums winna Plik-
kuma jeb Pleiki balts pafarkans
irr/ un itt ka tee Spittati Mee-
fas Ahdā israugahs.
44. Tas Wihrs irr spittaligs/
wisch irr nefschkihsts/ tam Pree-
steram buhs winnu par nefschkih-
stu turreht/ winna Waina irr
us winna Galwu.
45. Un ta Spittaliga Dreh-
behm/ kam fchi Waina irr/buhs
aplohfstahm buht/ un ta Galwa
atfegta/ un tam buhs sawas Luh-
pas nisfegt/ un tam buhs faukt/
nefschkihsts/nefschkihsts.
46. Wiffās Deenas/ zifilgi ta
Waina winnam irr/taps tas par
nefschkihstu turrehts/wisch irr ne-
schkihsts/ tam buhs weenam pa-
cham dshwoht/abra preeksch Leh-
gera laid winna Mahju-Weeta
irr.
47. Un ja tee Spittati pee kah-
dahm Drehbehm buhs/ pee wil-
lainu Drehbehm/ jeb pee linnu
Drehbehm.
48. Jepschu tee irr pee Ap-
mefleem jeb Andeeni/ tik labbi pee
linnu ka willainu (Drehbehm)/"
